title: Collapse the cond-with-is_nil into nil-matching heads
prompt:
Given:

```
def label(user, post) do
  cond do
    is_nil(user) -> "guest"
    is_nil(post) -> "user: #{user.name}"
    true -> "#{user.name} — #{post.title}"
  end
end
```

Rewrite as three function heads pattern-matching on nil or on `%{...}` shapes. Output a complete `defmodule MyApp.PostDisplay do ... end`.
tier_rationale: Multi-argument head pattern with nil matches — tricky argument ordering.
